stemHtml:
An aircraft is cruising at its cruising altitude, when suddenly one of the passengers has a heart attack. The pilots decide to land at an en-route aerodrome given the urgency of the situation. Which of the following elements are included in your initial radio message, and in which sequence?

1. PAN PAN MEDICAL (x3)
2. PAN PAN (x3)
3. Your call sign
4. Nature of the urgency condition
5. Stop transmitting
6. Your intention
